name: CodeInjectionProcessor

ironRules.rule: Version lock (injection-version-lock:{nodeId}:{version}) at ORDER 1 — InjectionConflict on concurrent injection of same version.
Pre-write audit storeDocument(phase:PRE_WRITE) at ORDER 2 BEFORE injection code runs — serves as rollback pointer. Audit exists even if injection fails.
Inject code at ORDER 3 — after lock and pre-write audit confirmed.
Append-only audit — never updateDocument on any injection audit record. Each phase (PRE_WRITE, COMPLETE, FAILED) creates a new storeDocument.
storeDocument(result audit, phase:COMPLETE) at ORDER 4 BEFORE enqueue(CodeInjected). DNA-8. Extends NON-REPUDIATION-AUDIT-001.

keywords: code injection processor version lock pre-write audit rollback pointer append-only NON-REPUDIATION PRE_WRITE COMPLETE FAILED CodeInjected InjectionConflict T620 visual flow engine
